event: Building fire with firefighters responding at night
description: A multi-story urban building is engulfed in flames at night. Firefighters work with a tall red ladder propped against the facade. A fire engine is visible on the left, and a crowd of onlookers gathers in the street below. Smoke billows into a dark blue night sky. The windows glow with fire and light. The scene is painted with vigorous, expressive brushwork in dark blues, oranges, and reds.
